turns.content: What brings you in today?
My wife say I need check this spot. On my head. It there long time. I think it's nothing.
When did this start?
Maybe year now. I not sure. Not bother me. Just skin.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
No pain. Just dry skin. On forehead. Not hurt. Just feel rough.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever. I feel fine. Only the spot there.
What medications are you currently taking?
No medicine. I not take any.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
What is chronic? I don't understand. I not sick. I work every day. Feel good.
Are you allergic to any medications?
I don't know that word. I take no medicine. No problem.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I put cream on it. From store. My wife buy for me. It help little. But not go away.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Sun maybe make it more dry. But I not sure. Not bad. I not worry.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Not change nothing. I work farm. Sleep good. Only my wife talk. I not think about it much.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
I smoke some. Not many. Drink beer sometimes. Not much. On weekend.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
No. I don't think so. My father, he old but not this. I not remember.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. First time. Not have before. Just now.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
What? I not understand. Can say again more simple?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physical? 1. Not bad. Emotional? Maybe 2. I not worry. Just skin.
Do you have any questions for me?
No questions. I think fine. You tell me what need do.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know. It just skin. Maybe old man skin. You tell me. If fine, I happy.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. Nothing else. Just spot. That all.
